prompt: A realistic, well-lit open-plan corporate office with around 15 male employees working at desks with computers, all dressed in business casual shirts, focused on their tasks. No exaggerated expressions, no stereotypes, no text overlays.
insight: A strong visual metaphor showing class imbalance where one minority instance is surrounded by a dominant majority, similar to imbalanced classes in machine learning.
